sectionDescription: The perfect blend of traditional physical albums and modern technology to fully preserve life stories.

features.title: Phygital Bridge
features.description: Premium physical album with unique QR codes, allowing parents to take photos and record stories with a single touch.

features.title: Memory Management System
features.description: Gives the child the role of 'Editor-in-Chief' to organize, label, and add emotions to each memory fragment.

features.title: Legacy Timeline
features.description: Customizable timeline interface, weaving scattered storytelling fragments into a continuous family narrative.

features.title: Future Sharing Mode
features.description: Set access rights for future generations, turning memories into a living 'digital testament' for grandchildren anywhere.

marketTitle: Why the time to act is now
marketText: The Vietnamese expat community is growing and aging rapidly. Every day that passes is a family history page at risk of being lost forever. Don't let yourself say "I wish I had".
